## Checklist

- [ ] Tested the golden path manually in the browser
- [ ] Tested in both Arabic (RTL) and English (LTR) if this touches layout or new UI text
- [ ] Added/updated unit tests for new logic
- [ ] Added/updated an e2e test if this changes a user-facing flow
- [ ] No `console.log` / commented-out code / dead code left behind
- [ ] Ran `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, and `npm test` locally
